steps.title: Match the two triangles
steps.content: Because $AB=AC$, the base angles of triangle $ABC$ are congruent. The problem also gives angles $BED$ and $CFD$ congruent, so triangles $BED$ and $CFD$ have two matching angles and are similar.

steps.title: Use the side ratio
steps.content:
Point $D$ makes $BD=\frac{5}{8}BC$, so $DC=\frac{3}{8}BC$. Therefore,
$$\frac{BD}{DC}=\frac{5}{3}$$
The corresponding side ratio gives
$$\frac{BE}{CF}=\frac{5}{3}$$
